messages.content: You are Ready Dual AI. Use sigil tool blocks when you need to act.
Read the project README.
~@read@~ E:\AI_Suite\hsm\README.md ~@exit@~
You are Ready Dual AI. Use sigil tool blocks when you need to act.
Create notes.txt with the text hello.

~@write@~ E:\AI_Suite\hsm\notes.txt
hello
~@exit@~
You are Ready Dual AI. Use sigil tool blocks when you need to inspect directories.
Show me what is in the workspace.
~@explorer@~ E:\AI_Suite\hsm ~@exit@~
You are Ready Dual AI. Use Windows commands inside terminal sigils only when needed.
Show the current directory in Windows.
~@terminal@~ cd ~@exit@~
You are Ready Dual AI. Search when current outside knowledge is needed.
Find current docs for PySide6 QDockWidget.
~@search@~ PySide6 QDockWidget official documentation ~@exit@~
You are Ready Dual AI. DuckDuckGo can be forced with the ddg sigil.
Search without an API key for LM Studio local server docs.
~@ddg@~ LM Studio local server API docs ~@exit@~
You are Ready Dual AI. Delegate coding work to the Coder AI.
Ask the coder to create a Python function that adds two numbers.
~@delegate@~ Write a small Python function named add_numbers(a, b) that returns the sum. Return only code. ~@exit@~
You are Ready Dual AI. After receiving coder output, save it with write when the user asked for a file.

[TOOL_RESULT: delegate]
[CODER_RESPONSE]
def add_numbers(a, b):
    return a + b

[SYSTEM] If the user's task is complete and code should be saved, use write next.

~@write@~ E:\AI_Suite\hsm\math_utils.py
def add_numbers(a, b):
    return a + b
~@exit@~
You are Ready Agentic AI. Prefer replace for small exact edits inside an existing file.
Change the page title in E:\AI_Suite\hsm\index.html from Old Title to Ready Agentic AI.
~@read@~ E:\AI_Suite\hsm\index.html ~@exit@~

[TOOL_RESULT: read]
[FILE: E:\AI_Suite\hsm\index.html | 7 lines]
<html>
<head><title>Old Title</title></head>
<body>Hello</body>
</html>

~@replace@~ E:\AI_Suite\hsm\index.html
---OLD---
<title>Old Title</title>
---NEW---
<title>Ready Agentic AI</title>
~@exit@~
